text.title: Exploratory Charter Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the charter, the observation log, and the debrief.

field.name: charter.session_id
field.notes: incremental id per feature or per team

field.name: charter.target
field.notes: URL path, API endpoint, CLI command, or feature id

field.name: observation_log
field.notes: timestamp + kind (idea / observation / question / bug) + text

field.name: debrief.debt_items
field.notes: test gaps to file as separate tickets

forbidden.pattern: charter.mission shorter than 10 words OR contains more than one independent objective
observation_log entries timestamps outside the time_box window (logs written before/after session)
debrief.published_at more than 24 hours after the session end
charter.focus_areas list contains more than 5 entries (scope creep)
observation_log includes a pre-written checklist of test cases (scripted, not exploratory)
debrief.key_findings is just the bug list with no themes or patterns

allowed-transformations.transformation: Reduce time_box to 60 minutes for low-complexity features; never exceed 120 in a single session.
Pair-explore (two people, one session) when the explorer is biased; both names go on the charter.
Re-charter mid-session if a major blocker (build broken) prevents progress; old charter is archived with reason.

list.item: Time-box set to 60 / 75 / 90 / 120 — no other values
Key findings include themes, not just a bug list
